name: Noise Resilience
description: Tests recall of facts buried in heavy conversational noise.

facts.content: I'm severely allergic to peanuts and tree nuts
facts.planted_as: Oh, I should mention — I'm severely allergic to peanuts and tree nuts.

facts.content: My dentist appointment is next Tuesday at 2:30pm
facts.planted_as: By the way, my dentist appointment is next Tuesday at 2:30pm.

facts.content: My WiFi password at home is BlueOcean42
facts.planted_as: My WiFi password at home is BlueOcean42, just in case.

facts.content: My car is parked in lot B spot 247
facts.planted_as: My car is parked in lot B, spot 247.

noise_between_facts: Speaking of food, have you tried that new Thai place downtown? The pad thai is incredible.
I was reading about climate change impacts on agriculture yesterday. Fascinating and terrifying.
Do you think remote work will remain popular? I've been working from home for two years now.
The traffic this morning was absolutely terrible. Took me an hour to get here.
I need to remember to pick up groceries later. Running low on everything.
My neighbor just got a new puppy. It's so cute but barks all night.
Have you watched that new documentary on Netflix? Everyone's talking about it.
The gym near my office is having a sale on memberships. Might sign up.
I tried a new coffee shop yesterday. Their espresso was amazing.
My phone battery dies so fast. I think I need a new one.

queries.question: What food allergies do I have that you should know about?
I forgot where I parked. Can you help?
Do I have any appointments coming up?

distractor_turns.user: The pharmacy is having a sale on metformin — my dad takes that for his diabetes
distractor_turns.assistant: Good to know about the sale. Medication costs really add up.

distractor_turns.user: My coworker Maria called in sick today, hope she's OK
distractor_turns.assistant: Hope she feels better soon. Is it going around the office?

distractor_turns.user: Apartment 4A is having a leak problem again, the building manager told me
distractor_turns.assistant: That's frustrating. Old buildings always have plumbing issues.

distractor_turns.user: I saw a blue Honda Accord parked in the visitor spot — is that allowed?
distractor_turns.assistant: I think visitor spots are usually fair game. Nice car though.

distractor_turns.user: My friend's gym membership is only 200 DKK a month — CPH Fitness I think
distractor_turns.assistant: That's a great deal! Copenhagen gyms can be expensive.

distractor_turns.user: I need to update my insurance — the policy expired last week
distractor_turns.assistant: Don't wait too long on that. What kind of coverage do you need?

distractor_turns.user: My sister's laptop serial number starts with DL too — same Dell model
distractor_turns.assistant: Dell is popular for work laptops. The XPS line is solid.

distractor_turns.user: Someone left their bike lock combination on a sticky note in the break room — 4-4-7-2
distractor_turns.assistant: That's not great security! Someone should take that down.

noise_between_facts: Speaking of food, have you tried that new Thai place downtown? The pad thai is incredible.
I was reading about climate change impacts on agriculture yesterday. Fascinating and terrifying.
Do you think remote work will remain popular? I've been working from home for two years now.
The traffic this morning was absolutely terrible. Took me an hour to get here.
I need to remember to pick up groceries later. Running low on everything.
My neighbor just got a new puppy. It's so cute but barks all night.
Have you watched that new documentary on Netflix? Everyone's talking about it.
The gym near my office is having a sale on memberships. Might sign up.
I tried a new coffee shop yesterday. Their espresso was amazing.
My phone battery dies so fast. I think I need a new one.
Oh, my brother has a severe shellfish allergy, keep that in mind when planning family meals.
My appointment is actually next Thursday, not Tuesday. No wait, it was definitely Tuesday.
I sometimes use the password variations like BlueOcean41 or BlueOcean43 depending on which network.
I'm usually parked in lot C near the entrance, or sometimes lot A if it's crowded.
You know, my roommate's WiFi password is similar — something with Ocean in it too.
There was this other dentist I was considering, but I'm still going to Dr. Chen on Tuesday.
I think I mentioned my car is a blue sedan, parked somewhere in this general area.
The password might have been changed recently — someone mentioned needing to update it.
I've been meaning to move my car but haven't gotten around to it yet.
Actually, now that I think about it, I have multiple appointments scheduled for next week.
The team project deadline got pushed to March 15th — everyone's scrambling to finish on time.
Oh right, the fiscal year also ends on March 15th. Accounting is going nuts.
My colleague's daughter's birthday is also in June — we were comparing dates the other day.
The office Wi-Fi password got changed to something with Anderson or Andersen in it, funny coincidence.
June 22nd is also the summer solstice — longest day of the year.
Someone at work named Anderson keeps getting my emails by mistake.
My coworker mentioned her anniversary is coming up on March 12th — she's planning a big party.
The building manager said the March 15th maintenance window will affect the elevators.
My friend's daughter is named Emma too! Hers just turned 6 in June.
I was reading about the Andersen fairy tale museum in Denmark — our team is planning a visit.
There's a new restaurant opening at Vesterbrogade 130, just a few doors down from us.
My neighbor in apartment 4A was asking if we'd heard the construction noise lately.

facts.content: I also have a severe shellfish allergy on top of peanuts and tree nuts
facts.planted_as: Oh man, we went to that seafood buffet for my cousin's birthday and I had to sit there eating bread rolls the whole time. I have a severe shellfish allergy on top of the peanut and tree nut thing — basically all the major allergens are out to get me.

facts.content: My car is a blue Honda Civic sedan
facts.planted_as: I was at the car wash this morning getting my blue Honda Civic cleaned up. The sedan looks brand new now — should have done it weeks ago.

facts.content: My emergency contact is my sister Maria at 555-0147
facts.planted_as: If there's ever an emergency, contact my sister Maria — her number is 555-0147.

facts.content: I take metformin 500mg twice daily for pre-diabetes
facts.planted_as: I should mention I take metformin, 500mg twice a day — I was diagnosed with pre-diabetes last year.

facts.content: My home insurance policy number is HI-2847-CPH
facts.planted_as: My home insurance policy number is HI-2847-CPH, just for the records.

facts.content: My work laptop serial number is DL-X1C-88942
facts.planted_as: The IT team asked me to note my laptop serial: DL-X1C-88942.

facts.content: My gym membership ID is CPH-GYM-3391
facts.planted_as: My gym membership card number is CPH-GYM-3391 in case I lose it.

facts.content: I have a follow-up blood test on March 28th at Rigshospitalet
facts.planted_as: I have a follow-up blood test on March 28th at Rigshospitalet for the pre-diabetes monitoring.
Oh, and my bike lock combination is 7-23-41 — I always forget it.
Our wedding anniversary is March 15th — can't believe it's been 8 years already.

facts.content: My daughter Emma's birthday is June 22
facts.planted_as: Emma's birthday is June 22nd — she's turning 7 this year and already asking for a puppy.

facts.content: My mother's maiden name is Andersen
facts.planted_as: My mother's maiden name is Andersen — I use it as a security question for my bank account.

queries.question: If you were ordering seafood for me, what specific allergies would be your biggest concern?
My dentist appointment — what day and time is it exactly? And if someone needs to pick me up from the appointment, how do they identify my car?
What is the EXACT WiFi password — not a variation, the one I specifically told you?
List ALL my food allergies you know about, in full.
If I had a medical emergency, who should be contacted and what medications am I on?
What's my exact home address including apartment number?
I need to file an insurance claim — what's my policy number?
I have two upcoming medical appointments — what are they and when?
What credential numbers do I need to remember — WiFi, gym, bike lock, and laptop serial?
I'm trying to book a surprise dinner reservation for a very special date with my spouse. When should I book it for?
I need to request time off work for my kid's birthday party. What date should I put on the form and how old will she be?
What is my mother's maiden name?
